{{CargoClone
|name=Spike Turtle
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=114
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} FTH +50
|gene3=Earth DMG +30
|gene4=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Mecha Minion Skin DEF +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Mecha Minion Skin DEF +50%
|}}
